div.head: The Minister in Switzerland (Harrison) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 4604. Your 1945, June 6; my 4260, July 5.Neither printed. Foreign Office note dated yesterday states according telegram from Swiss Legation, Budapest, Hungarian Government has authorized departure from Hungary all Jews in possession entry permit for another country, including Palestine.For original statement on Hungarian offer made public in Switzerland by the Intercross on July 18, see circular telegram of August 18, p. 1127.

According same message German Government will permit transit through occupied territories. Necessary measures for evacuation will
be taken soon as possible by Swiss Legation in collaboration with Palestinian Bureau, Budapest. Travel documents will probably be Hungarian police passports.
